---
title: "Yosuke Kimura"
---

## Associate Professor of Finance

I am an Associate Professor at Institute of Science Tokyo.

My research interests include corporate finance, firm dynamics, information economics, innovation, and financial markets.

## Research Interests

- Corporate finance
- Firm dynamics
- Information, disclosure, and financial markets
- Innovation and networks
- Data, AI, and decision-making

## Contact

Email: kimura.y.bq[at]m.titech.ac.jp
